subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Blessed Beauty! Thy letter was received. It brought a message of friendship and bore testimony to thy steadfastness in the Cause of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال مبارک نامه شما رسید پیام آشنا بود و دلیل بر استقامت بر امر الله
subcodes.subjects: @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy, @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @Manifestation of God as sun
